summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 13 features: Course Completion Certificates, PWA Push Notifications, Advanced Search Results Page, and Marketing Branding Strategy page. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed after fixing a bug in SearchBar.jsx.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: TypeError: items.map is not a function - The search API returns a 'total' field (integer) which was being treated as an array in Object.values().reduce()
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added filter to skip 'total' field and check Array.isArray() before mapping

critical_code_review_comments: certificates.py: Properly generates branded PDF certificates with reportlab, handles timezone-aware dates
push_notifications.py: VAPID key endpoint is public (returns empty key if not configured), subscribe/status/unsubscribe endpoints require auth
search.py: Returns structured results with courses, community, archives, cohorts, spaces, and total count
DashboardPage.jsx: Correctly fetches and displays certificates section (data-testid='my-certificates')
SearchResultsPage.jsx: Full search results page with faceted filters (type, sort, access level)
MarketingPage.jsx: Comprehensive marketing page with one-pager, social media strategy, hashtag bank
SettingsPage.jsx: Push notification card with enable/disable toggle (data-testid='push-notification-card')
SearchBar.jsx: Fixed to handle 'total' field in search results
Sidebar.jsx: Marketing nav link visible for faculty+ roles (data-testid='nav-marketing')

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI tests passed after bug fix)

test_credentials.test_users_created: ITER13_TEST_ and ITER13_FACULTY_ prefixed users for testing (all cleaned up)

seed_data_creation: Test users with student and faculty roles created for testing authenticated endpoints and role-based UI features.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested new features: (1) Course Completion Certificates - /api/certificates/my-certificates returns list of completed courses, /api/certificates/check/{course_id} returns eligibility, /api/certificates/download/{course_id} generates PDF (requires 100% progress). Dashboard shows certificates section with download links. (2) PWA Push Notifications - /api/push/vapid-key is public (may return empty key), /api/push/status returns subscribed boolean, POST /api/push/subscribe stores subscription, DELETE /api/push/subscribe removes it. Settings page has push notification card with toggle. (3) Advanced Search Results Page - /api/search?q=... returns structured results with courses, community, archives, cohorts, spaces, total. SearchResultsPage at /search with faceted filters. SearchBar has 'View all results' link. (4) Marketing Branding Strategy page - /marketing route (faculty+ only) with one-pager, 16 platform features, social media copy for Instagram/Twitter/LinkedIn, hashtag bank. (5) Bug fixed: SearchBar.jsx was crashing due to 'total' field in search results being treated as array.
